description: Mixture of 3 Gaussians in 2D with separated modes
notes: Mixture mean: 0.4*(-4,-4) + 0.3*(4,4) + 0.3*(-4,4) = (-1.6, 0.8). Var = sum_k w_k*(sigma_k^2 + mu_k^2) - mu_mix^2. Three well-separated modes test mode-jumping capability. Mode 3 has anisotropic variance (wider in x1, narrower in x2). Verify: (1) all 3 modes are visited, (2) mode weights match.
